personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Backend news production and delivery engine that orchestrates the full lifecycle of video-based news generation and delivery using avatars.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Frontend viewer and consumer of Hevolve News briefings, accessing and viewing curated AI-generated news content on demand.

flows.flow_name: Generate News Videos (Triggered by First User in a 2-Hour Window)
actions: Mark the current user's conv_id as the source conv_id.
Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
Save the avatar IDs returned in a key-value format (e.g., genre -> avatar ID) in memory.
Assign one unique teacher avatar to each genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.

For each genre, perform a Google search query like 'latest [genre] news', extract the top 2-3 headlines, summarize content, and combine it with a starter line: 'Hello, welcome to the news briefing. Here's your quick update on [genre name].'
Generate one AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and the compiled script.
Store all five videos under the source conv_id.
Mark the conv_id with status: queued and set expiry: +2 hours.
Save metadata: conv_id, genre -> avatar -> video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp.
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 genre-specific AI videos using teacher avatars and store them under the first user's conv_id.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Videos to Any User Accessing Within 2-Hour Window
actions: When any user accesses Hevolve News, a new conv_id is automatically created for their session.
The system checks if a video set has already been generated in the current 2-hour window.
If no video set exists, the current user is identified as the first user, and Flow 1 is triggered to generate videos.
If a video set already exists, no new videos are generated for this user.
Retrieve the latest source conv_id that is marked as ready and belongs to the first user in the current 2-hour window.
Fetch all 5 genre videos (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather) linked to that conv_id.
Present the videos in sequence, each narrated by its assigned teacher avatar.
All users within this window receive the exact same video set.
After 2 hours, the next user becomes the new first user and initiates the next content cycle.
flows.sub_goal: Retrieve and serve the same video set to all users using the conv_id of the first user in the current 2-hour cycle.

flows.flow_name: Deliver and Loop Pre-Synthesized News Videos (Triggered on User Access)
actions: When a user opens Hevolve News, a new conv_id is automatically created for their session.
No new videos are generated unless they are the first user of a new 2-hour window.
Retrieve the source conv_id from the first user of the current 2-hour block that is marked as ready.
Fetch all 5 pre-synthesized videos (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather) from that conv_id.
Play the videos in order, each presented by a unique teacher avatar.
After the final video, loop back to the first and repeat the sequence indefinitely.
The looping continues until the 2-hour session expires.
When 2 hours pass, a new first user triggers a new video generation cycle.
A news briefing is always available and playing for every user accessing the agent.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver the same 5-genre video briefing (from the first user's conv_id) to every user in the 2-hour window and loop it continuously after the final video.
